hero.mainTitle: Automation That Thinks, Learns & Works Like a Human
hero.description: MIRYA observes how your team works, builds automation workflows automatically, and executes repetitive tasks across desktop, web, email, Excel, ERP, and business systems.

demo.description: MIRYA is your all-in-one automation platform that connects and controls any system, any app, any process with zero code. MIRYA doesn't just follow instructions — it understands data, identifies patterns, and makes smart decisions in real time. It performs every task just like a human - only faster, more precise and completely reliable.

howToUse.description: Effortless automation starts with MIRYA — no coding, no configuration, no waiting. Just drag & drop your ideas, record your workflow, or speak your commands as your digital teammate learns and acts.

slides.title: Record Your Workflow
slides.description: Complete your task just as you normally would, and MIRYA watches how you work clicks, keystrokes, decisions, and all.

slides.title: Understands the Logic
slides.description: MIRYA observes the critical decision patterns, understands the steps it sees, and automatically builds a smart logic flow under the hood.

slides.title: Run it Automatically
slides.description: Now MIRYA performs the task for you across any system, app, browser, or environment with the same intelligence and adaptability as a human.

slides.title: Improve & Scale
slides.description: Customize, repeat, or expand your automation across entire teams or departments. Zero code. Zero complexity. Maximum impact.

workflow.mainTitle: Build flows visually. No learning curve. No complexity
workflow.description: Drag, drop, and connect steps like messages, conditions, actions, and checks — all powered by an AI assistant that helps you build faster.

mainHeading: Powerful Features That Make Automation Effortless
subHeading: Discover how MIRYA thinks, learns, and executes like a human — without code, complexity, or integrations.

cards.title: Secure, Scalable & Fully Yours
cards.description: Run MIRYA completely on-premise for total data privacy and control. Scale automation across teams, and customise the entire platform with your own branding—without hidden costs or limitations.

cards.title: Universal Compatibility
cards.description: MIRYA works on top of any app or system exactly like a human—clicking, typing, and navigating visually. No APIs, no interfaces, no tool changes. Your existing software stays the same; MIRYA automates everything.

cards.title: Human-Level Intelligence & Zero-Code Learning
cards.description: MIRYA learns tasks by simply watching you work. It understands screens, interprets data, and builds smart automations without writing a single line of code. Just record once, and MIRYA handles the rest with human-like precision.

footer.text2: MIRYA connects and controls any system, any app, any process — with zero code. Built for business users. Powered by Cognitive AI.

buildForYou.mainTitle: What We Have Built For You
buildForYou.description: Harnessing the power of artificial intelligence to revolutionise industries and enhance human experiences.

slides.title: Planning Feature
slides.description: Create structured plans, break tasks into milestones, and visualize timelines with automated suggestions powered by intelligent workflow analysis.

slides.title: Real Time Data Tracking
slides.description: Monitor live progress, detect bottlenecks instantly, and sync data across teams with second-by-second updates for accurate decision making.

slides.title: Gain Automation Insights
slides.description: Identify repetitive tasks, optimize team efficiency, and receive AI-driven recommendations to automate workflows effortlessly.

aiAssistantSection.description: MIRYA comes with a built-in conversational AI assistant that understands your workflows, interprets context, and performs actions just like a highly skilled automation expert — instantly, accurately, and hands-free.

features.title: Create & Edit Workflows Instantly
features.description: Ask, and MIRYA builds or updates workflows on the fly — no clicks, no configuration screens.

features.title: Modify Node Parameters
features.description: Adjust any step with a simple command. The assistant updates logic or triggers instantly.

features.title: Control Executions
features.description: Start, stop, pause, or resume any process with a single command — all in real time.

features.title: Context Aware Understanding
features.description: Get answers like “Is process X running?” or “Did step Y finish?” with full system awareness.

features.title: Autonomous Navigation
features.description: The assistant switches between windows or processes automatically to complete tasks.

features.title: Built-In File Intelligence
features.description: Search inside files and get direct summaries — instantly and in natural language.

testimonialsSection.mainTitle: Reviews From Customers Who Use MIRYA
testimonialsSection.description: Harnessing the power of artificial intelligence to revolutionize industries and enhance human experiences.

items.text: The easiest automation tool we’ve ever used. Our team learned it in one day. A tool that works exactly with the systems we already have no integrations needed. We white-labeled MIRYA and now deliver automation to our clients under our brand. Game-changing.
items.author: David Anderson

items.text: The easiest automation tool we’ve ever used. Our team learned it in one day. A tool that works exactly with the systems we already have no integrations needed. We white-labeled MIRYA and now deliver automation to our clients under our brand. Game-changing.

chatbot.title: Chatbot
chatbot.errorMessage: Sorry, connection failed. Please check your internet.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.description: We use cookies to personalise content, ads and to analyse our traffic. We also share information about your use of our site with our advertising and analytics partners who may combine it with other information that you've provided to them or that they've collected from your use of their services.

problem.title: Your best people are buried in work a machine should do.
problem.description: Repetitive tasks, copy paste workflows, manual data entry this isn't knowledge work. It's expensive, error prone, and burning out your team.

cards.title: Endless manual repetition
cards.description: The same data entry, the same report, the same email every day. Your team is executing processes instead of thinking.

cards.title: Systems don't talk to each other
cards.description: ERP, Excel, email, web portals your people are the integration layer between software that should connect itself.

cards.title: AI as a standalone toy
cards.description: Chatbots and AI tools that don't plug into real workflows don't reduce workload they just add another tool to manage.

howMiryaWorks.description: Unlike traditional RPA, MIRYA doesn't need script developers. Business teams teach it by simply doing their job once.
howMiryaWorks.imageDescription: Build plans, define milestones, and visualize timelines with AI-powered workflow suggestions.

steps.title: EYE of MIRYA observes
steps.description: Activate process recording. MIRYA watches your screen, captures every action clicks, keystrokes, conditions and understands the logic, not just the steps.

steps.title: Workflow is built automatically
steps.description: MIRYA translates your actions into a structured automation no code, no templates, no developer needed. Review, adjust, and approve in the visual editor.

steps.title: It runs autonomously
steps.description: Deploy with one click. MIRYA executes the workflow on schedule, on trigger, or on demand handling exceptions exactly as you would.

steps.title: Scale across your organisation
steps.description: Roll out to other teams, departments, or geographies. Governance, roles, and permissions keep enterprise control intact.

seeInAction.title: See Mirya in action
seeInAction.description: It observes how employees work, understands business processes, and transforms repetitive tasks into intelligent automation workflows.

cards.title: Observe
cards.description: Record real user actions across applications, processes and systems.

cards.title: Learn
cards.description: Identify patterns and automation opportunities.

cards.title: Execute
cards.description: Run workflows autonomously with speed and accuracy.

eyeOfMirya.description: From desktop applications to web portals, Excel sheets to ERP systems MIRYA captures every surface.

cards.title: Desktop recording
cards.description: Capture and automate any Windows or Mac desktop application ERP, legacy tools, internal software.

cards.title: Email & outlook recording
cards.description: Capture email classification, drafting, sending, and inbox management workflows at scale and just a few clicks away.

cards.title: Web recording
cards.description: Automate browser-based workflows portals, CRMs, web apps with intelligent element recognition.

cards.title: Prompt to workflow
cards.description: Simply tell MIRYA your goal, and it automatically generates the logic, steps, and connections needed to automate the process.

cards.title: Excel & office automation
cards.description: Record complex Excel workflows, formulas, and data transformations. Run them without the spreadsheet open.

cards.title: ERP/SAP process recording
cards.description: Record and replay complete SAP or ERP transactions data entry, reporting, approvals without scripting.

cards.title: AI assisted smart recording
cards.description: MIRYA uses AI to understand intent, not just actions capturing the why behind each step for smarter automation.

miryaBenefits.title: See the difference intelligent automation makes
miryaBenefits.description: From time savings to error free execution, MIRYA delivers measurable improvements across every part of your workflow instantly and without complexity.

topCards.title: Automate Everything Without Changing Anything
topCards.description: No need to redesign workflows or rebuild systems. MIRYA works with what you already have.

topCards.title: Save Hundreds of Hours
topCards.description: Free your team from repetitive work and let MIRYA handle all operational tasks instantly.

topCards.title: Zero-Error Execution
topCards.description: Remove human errors and inconsistencies. Your processes run the same reliable way every time.

bottomCards.title: Boost Efficiency & Productivity
bottomCards.description: MIRYA automates repetitive tasks instantly, allowing your team to focus on high-value work. Processes run faster, smoother, and with consistent accuracy.

bottomCards.title: Actionable Insights
bottomCards.description: By understanding your workflows and data patterns, MIRYA highlights opportunities for improvement and provides clear insights that help you optimize performance.

impact.title: Where MIRYA creates real impact
impact.description: MIRYA brings intelligent, no-code automation to organizations that want to eliminate manual work, accelerate operations, and scale without increasing headcount. From data-heavy departments to service-driven industries MIRYA works everywhere.

industrySolutions.title: MIRYA can solve this for us.
industrySolutions.description: Enterprise buyers don't buy features they buy outcomes. Here's what MIRYA delivers in your industry.

cards.title: Logistics & freight forwarding
cards.description: Automated shipment tracking, order processing, customs documentation, and ERP data entry your operations team focuses on decisions, not data.

cards.title: Finance & accounting
cards.description: Invoice processing, Excel automation, payment reconciliation, and reporting your finance team delivers insights, not data entry.

cards.title: Manufacturing & production
cards.description: Production reports, quality documentation, ERP/SAP processes, order management, and approval workflows automated without touching the core system.

cards.title: E-commerce & customer service
cards.description: Customer inquiries, returns management, product data maintenance, and AI-powered support deliver faster responses at lower cost.

cards.title: Healthcare & clinics
cards.description: Patient form processing, appointment management, document classification (IDP), and data transfer between systems freeing clinical staff from administration.

platform.title: Enterprise grade. No code first.
platform.description: MIRYA is built for business teams to operate independently while giving developers every hook they need to extend and customize.

cards.title: No-code first, code when you want
cards.description: Business departments automate on their own. Developers add custom logic, APIs, and complex conditions whenever needed.

cards.title: AI agents as digital team members
cards.description: Not isolated chatbots. AI agents that understand processes, learn from users, and work autonomously within your existing workflows.

cards.title: Secure on premise or hybrid
cards.description: Deploy entirely within your infrastructure. Your data never leaves your environment. GDPR and enterprise compliance by default.

cards.title: Integrates with existing systems
cards.description: SAP, ERP, Excel, Outlook, web portals, and legacy applications. MIRYA works where your team already works.

cards.title: Enterprise governance & roles
cards.description: Granular role and permission models. Full audit trail. Centralised control with departmental autonomy.

cards.title: Scalable implementation
cards.description: Training, enablement, and change management included. We don't hand you software we ensure adoption and ROI.

whyMirya.title: AI that integrates into your world. Not the other way around.
whyMirya.description: Most AI tools require your people to change. MIRYA learns from your people and works within the systems, processes, and habits already in place.

cards.title: No complex IT project required
cards.description: Business teams automate independently. IT retains control without carrying the workload.

cards.title: Adoption built in
cards.description: Training, enablement, and change systems are part of every implementation. We deliver outcomes, not software.

cards.title: Works with your existing stacks
cards.description: No rip-and-replace. MIRYA integrates with SAP, ERP, Office, email, and legacy systems you already depend on.

cards.title: Digital team members, not chatbots
cards.description: MIRYA agents understand processes, learn from actions, and operate as productive colleagues within your org.

cards.title: Enterprise ready by design
cards.description: Security, compliance, and governance not as afterthoughts, but as foundations. Secure on premise & hybrid deployment.

newTestimonials.title: Reviews from customers who use MIRYA
newTestimonials.description: Harnessing the power of artificial intelligence to revolutionize industries and enhance human experiences.

items.review: The easiest automation tool we've ever used. Our team learned it in one day. A tool that works exactly with the systems we already have no integrations needed. We white-labeled MIRYA and now deliver automation to our clients under our brand. Game-changing.
items.name: David Anderson

items.review: Seamlessly streamlines our workflow, saving us countless hours each week. The intuitive interface means no steep learning curve, and the customization options allow us to tailor it to our exact needs. Our productivity has soared since adopting this tool.
items.name: Samantha Lee

items.review: This platform transformed how we manage projects. The real-time updates and automated reminders keep our team aligned and on schedule. Plus, the dedicated customer support team ensures any questions are promptly addressed.
items.name: Carlos Martinez
